vendorPricing.heading: Dynamic Pricing
vendorPricing.subtitle: A date-aware suggested price — always yours to override.

noRules.title: No pricing rules yet
noRules.description: Add a pricing rule with a base price and your floor / ceiling bounds to see auspicious-date and demand-aware suggestions.

vendorPricing.noSuggestion: No suggestion available for this date. Try another date or check the rule is active.
vendorPricing.suggestionNote: This is a suggestion — you can always set your own final price.

adminGaps.heading: Vendor Supply Gaps
adminGaps.subtitle: Under-supplied (city × category) markets to prioritise for vendor recruiting.

loadError.title: Couldn't load supply gaps
loadError.description: The gap report is unavailable right now. Try again shortly.

noGaps.title: No gaps at this threshold
noGaps.description: Every active market has at least {threshold} vendors per category. Lower the threshold to probe deeper.

filter.label: Min vendors / market
filter.validation: Must be a number between 1 and 100.
